market_overview.headline: Market showing broad weakness with both SPY and QQQ in unstacked bearish structures while BTC remains in full bear mode.
market_overview.detail: Only 28% of stocks in Full Bull versus 31% in Full Bear, with major indices showing potential bullish crossover alerts suggesting possible bottoming action but still below key EMAs.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Candidates with Bullish EMA Crossovers

items.note: Strong buy rated stock rallying 3.87% above 8W EMA with price holding above 13W in bear structure

items.note: Cybersecurity leader showing resilience with 3.69% gain above 8W EMA despite bearish structure

momentum_themes.headline: Memory/Storage and Financial Outperformance
momentum_themes.detail: Memory and storage stocks leading with SNDK, WDC, and MU showing explosive momentum while select financials like WFCNP demonstrate sector rotation strength.

sector_analysis.headline: Commodities Strong, Tech Services Imploding

strongest.note: Perfect bullish score with all 11 stocks in Full Bull structure
Small but perfectly bullish sector showing commodity strength
Mining sector fully bullish with 8 of 9 stocks in pullback mode

weakest.note: Sector in complete breakdown with only 2 of 21 stocks showing bullish structure
Complete bearish washout across all names in sector
Largest sector showing significant weakness with over 60% in bear structure

sector_analysis.detail: Clear commodity/resource rotation into strength while technology services face broad liquidation. Financial sector mixed with selective strength in preferred shares.

items.text: Both SPY and QQQ in unstacked bearish structures with potential for further downside
Technology services sector in complete breakdown with 90% bear rate
High volume pullbacks like ADTTF (5.71x avg) suggest institutional selling pressure
BTC in full bear mode at -45% below fair value could signal broader risk-off environment
